title: BIDSHub: Multi-platform neuroimaging dataset management and exploration
description: BIDSHub is a local-first desktop and web application for browsing, filtering, quality-controlling, downloading, and exporting BIDS neuroimaging datasets across multiple platforms (OpenNeuro, DANDI, Pennsieve, XNAT, HPC/SSH, and local folders), with an integrated NIfTI viewer and one-click BIDS cohort export.
